hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 440 m from property

snippets.snippet: My room was spacious with hot running water in the bathroom.
Located in a small complex near the city center.
We were allowed early check in, so kind of them.
Good hotel, excellent location in Chinatown
Walking distance to food court and restoran nearby.
A well maintained budget hotel that was very comfortable.

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers car park free of charge. Strategically situated in Banda Aceh, allowing you access and proximity to local attractions and sights. Rated with 4.5 stars, this high-quality property provides guests with access to massage, restaurant and spa on-site.

details.title: Infant 0-1 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 2-7 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 8 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

reviewSnippets: For the price, it’s considered very decent.
Best budget location to stay in Banda Aceh
Bagus & Berbaloi.. Value for money, central location
My room was spacious with hot running water in the bathroom.
Located in a small complex near the city center.
Best budget location to stay in Banda Aceh
Bagus & Berbaloi.. Value for money, central location
The staff are friendly and helpful.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Affordable prices with well-maintained facilities... highly recommended for those who want to stay at varied prices and with good amenities.
comments.originalComment: Harga terjangkau dengan fasilitas yg msh terjaga..sangat rekomendasi utk kamu yg mau menginap dgn hrg yg variatif dan fasilitas yg baik

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Though the room is small but it's clean and well designed.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
I stayed here one night as I was catching the 1st ferry to Pulau Weh.
The staff are friendly and helpful.
My room was spacious with hot running water in the bathroom.
In the lobby and on all floors theirs drinking water.
My Home is located close to local setting places that are amazing value for money.
The homestay is quiet with  no traffic noise and it's clean. There is a mosque close by. The call to prayer in the morning only lasts 10 - 15 minutes. Had I not been awake I would not have heard it.
I would stay here again.
Remember you are in Indonesia. It is basic.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: This is my 2nd time staying here. I prefer this place is mainly due to the location & accessibility to nearby eateries and shops

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
The first room I was given had very poor WiFi reception. But I was able to change to another one with was much better. Both rooms are on the second floor.
There is cold and relatively hot water dispenser on every floor.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Very small, extremely basic, they said there was Internet but none of us could connect which was disappointing.
comments.reviewPositives: The room was clean I guess
comments.reviewTitle: Unless you’re extremely broke don’t stay here spend a little extra and get a nicer place.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Located in a small complex near the city center. For the price, it’s considered very decent. Worth the stay
comments.reviewTitle: Best budget location to stay in Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewTitle: i will stay here in future

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Recommended to stay in Acheh for location assesible to nearest food & souvenir facilities

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
Internet was quite slow. 

 Room size that I selected was small if you have one large check in luggage plus one carry-on,  as it will take up the space on ground and leave little room to walk around.
comments.reviewPositives:
Staff was polite and tried to help in whatever way they could.
Bathroom size was larger than expected and comfortable, if we compare it to the room size.
comments.reviewTitle: Good for solo travellers with a controlled budget

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Hotel bajet terbaik

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: We booked this accomodation basically to store our luggages. Unfortunately our flight was cancelled and we couldn't make it to Banda aceh. The hotel agreed to not let us pay given these unforeseen circumstances, but finally they did charge us. Communication was overall very difficult.
comments.reviewTitle: Disappointing communication and did not meet agreements made

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I will recommend my home if you are looking for a simple accommodation at a center of the town.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: There is no elevator but if you travel light that should be OK or you can ask for a room on the ground floor when booking.
comments.reviewPositives: The place is clean and has an excellent location.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Very strategic location.

Wifi was so 👎

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives: Room aircond not working properly. Takes forever to cool down.
comments.reviewPositives: Location quite central to shops and restaurant

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: feel likes home

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Recommended to budget travel. Nearby to mosque . Walking distance to food court and restoran nearby. Cimb Niagabank infront the hotel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Very clean, excellent service, great location

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Near to city center, can just walk around. Room is spacious and clean!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Stayed one night at My Home Aceh. On check in the room wasn't ready which wasn't a big deal. Cleanliness of the place was okay. Staff at the hotel was helpful and tried there best to overcome the language barrier. Overall it was an okay stay.
comments.reviewTitle: Decent budget hotel in Banda Aceh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Very clean and easy access to all important landmarks.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Clean and spacious room. The staff is helpful. Few meters away from the mainroad.
The water pressure is low. No lift. Only soap provided in the bathroom. 
Otherwise we had a nice stay there.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Located at the back of shophouses along Peunayong Street. A simple, no frills place but really serve its purpose. Clean room. Newly renovated bathroom. Comfy bed & pillow. Hot/Cold water dispenser are available in every floor. Very friendly and super helpful staff. Room was a bit small but didn’t matter for me bcoz i only be there for sleeping. There are many cafès and eateries around. Only 5 minutes walk to nearest money changer and souvenir shops. Easy to get Grab service too (if ‘MyHome’ doesn’t appear on your current location, just type ‘Seirama Coffee Shop’ - next door cafe)....the only disadvantage, no elevator.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText: Hi Jeff, Thanks for staying with us, see you next time.
comments.reviewComments: My Home Aceh is a very good budget hotel, well located downtown Aceh, with a kind, knowledgeable and helpful staff. I will stay with them again if I am ever in Banda Aceh and what good, clean basic accommodation.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel should upgrade the problem of the wifi connection. Its too poor connection. Overall is okay and nice. Thanks for the warm hospitality

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Good place to stay for travel. Near to the souvenir and food court. Nice for budget hotel. Not recommend if vacation with older because room was too small

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.responseText:
Hi waskito, Thanks for staying with us, 
sorry for that, because we are doing all the room renovations, sorry again, hopefully we can meet another time..
comments.reviewComments: The room was small but ok for the price. The bathroom was clean and modern. But I was given a room at the building where they are still doing A LOT OF construction. Imagine waking up at eight in the morning from people cutting tiles using a very loud machine in the next room. The workers also constantly banging on the wall of my room while putting nails on the wall. I don't k ow why they put me in this building. Maybe because I'm Indonesian with brown skin. If I were a white tourist I'm sure they would've given me a room in the building where there is no construction.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Thoroughly enjoyed the stay. Will come back in the future

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Location is central, room is clean and spacious though no other facilities.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Even before our arrival, they were very responsive to text messages and helpful to queries on estimated fares from the port to the hotel. We were allowed early check in, so kind of them. Plenty of food choices in the area and coffee places. There's a water dispenser on each floor. Toilet very clean. Beds were firm and comfy. AC functioned well n strong. Great value!
comments.reviewTitle: Bagus & Berbaloi.. Value for money, central location

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Actually two hotels  one budget and the other a bit more upscale. Friendly staff. Good food all around
comments.reviewTitle: good hotel, excellent location in Chinatown

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Located in center city, friendly staff, ac working very well, hot water, clean bed sheet..for me it is just excellent

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: My Home really provides the best service, clean rooms, and well-maintained and tidy bathrooms.
comments.originalComment: My Home emang selalu memberikan layanan terbaik, kamar yg bersih dan Kondisi toilet yg Rapi dan baik

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Clean room, good facilities.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: A well maintained budget hotel that was very comfortable. The only thing was that the Agoda description stated the room had a double and a single, but we got 2 single beds ( we were 3 people and it didn’t work).  I had to pay extra for another bed, though they gave me a discount for the misunderstanding. They insisted they don’t list family rooms on Agoda but it clearly stated I would be getting a double and single. It was still economical with the surcharge, though I should have received what was stated.
comments.reviewTitle: Good solid choice but misleading description

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Sehr freundliches Personal.  Es gibt viele Restaurants und Shops in der Nähe.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Bagus dan dekat dengan pusat kota

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Lokasi yg Sgt dekat dgn byk kedai. 
Saya berjalan2 Di sekitar hotel sekitar pkol 11mlm dgn rasa selamat Dan tenang (3 org perempuan). 
Staff hotel pulang kan balik barang yg saya tertinggal dlm hotel dgn Keadaan selamat Dan baik
.
Hotel ni tiada lift. Lain2 semuanya terbaik.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: A place i call home

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Hotel okay, bilik besar,bersih.
